description_long: This is a modern four-door police car with a black and white color scheme, featuring bold 'POLICE' lettering and a police badge insignia on both front doors. The roof displays a large '911' emergency number in black, along with a red and blue light bar and additional colored markings. The vehicle is equipped with black wheels, side mirrors, and a push bumper on the front. Emergency lights are visible on the roof and in the front grille, while the rear window area also features colored light markings. The car's windows are tinted, and the overall design is sleek and aerodynamic, typical of contemporary law enforcement sedans.
description: A sleek black and white police sedan with bold 'POLICE' markings, emergency lights, and a prominent '911' number on the roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the push bumper, grille lights, and the roof-mounted light bar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'POLICE' text, badge insignia, and side profile of the light bar.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the '911' number on the roof, rear lights, and the license plate area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with 'POLICE' text and badge insignia visible.
attribute_police_markings: The vehicle has large black 'POLICE' text on both front doors, a black '911' emergency number on the roof, and a black and white color scheme. There are also colored stripes (red and blue) on the roof and above the windshield, and a police badge insignia on the doors.
attribute_emergency_lights: A roof-mounted light bar with red and blue segments is present, along with additional red and blue lights in the front grille and colored markings on the rear window area.
attribute_police_insignia: A police badge insignia is visible on both front doors, featuring a shield design with a central emblem and text.
attribute_license_plate: A license plate is visible at the rear of the vehicle, located in the center below the trunk. It appears to be white with black text, though the exact text is not legible.
